behavior_summary: Provides Jenna NPC runtime behavior: presentation when inspected, area-entry/exit housekeeping, a continuous patrol/interaction loop, reactive conversation barks, and simple combat/alert behavior.

U8P_JENNA::look(): When a player inspects Jenna, returns a short descriptive bark that varies by whether Jenna is dead and by two global presentation flags (jennaName, jennaJob) to choose between full name+title, name-only, job-only, or a generic descriptor.
enterFastArea (U8P_JENNA::enterFastArea): Clears stored references and spawns a continuous behavior process (U8P_JENNA::0321) to run Jenna's patrol/interaction logic while the player is nearby.
leaveFastArea (U8P_JENNA::leaveFastArea): Frees references, checks sendJennaToLunch; if zero marks Jenna dead (Npc::setDead) otherwise teleports her to a randomized nearby location (Npc::teleport).

cast (U8P_JENNA::cast): Reaction to being targeted/attacked: examines current target (Npc::getTarget), may pause (spawn FREE::1C19) or call for help (spawn CALGUARD::0080) and bark different help lines chosen via randomness.

0321 (U8P_JENNA::0321): Long-running spawned behavior: iterates scripted tokens/nearby items, issues pathfinds (Npc::pathfind), spawns small sub-behaviors (U8P_JENNA::0B16, U8P_JENNA::0BA9, U8P_JENNA::04B8) and uses timed FREE helpers as delays — implements patrol/interact loop.

04B8 (U8P_JENNA::04B8): Conversation/proximity-response routine: if nobody is talking, orients Jenna toward targets, picks randomized barks influenced by orlokMet/global somebodyTalking, spawns orientation/animation helpers, and issues Item::bark lines.
notable_control_flow: Inspection flow (U8P_JENNA::look): check Npc::isDead(self) -> branch to corpse wording or alive wording -> consult jennaName and jennaJob globals to select the exact string -> Item::bark(pid,self,string).
Area lifecycle: enterFastArea resets refs and starts U8P_JENNA::0321; leaveFastArea frees refs and either sets Jenna dead (sendJennaToLunch == 0) or computes random coords and teleports her away.

Behavior loop spawns subroutines: U8P_JENNA::0321 runs continuously while spawned and conditionally spawns U8P_JENNA::04B8 (conversation) and short sub-behaviors (U8P_JENNA::0B16/U8P_JENNA::0BA9) to modularize actions.
Reactive combat/targeting: U8P_JENNA::cast inspects Npc::getTarget to decide whether to call guards (CALGUARD::0080) and which help-bark to play; randomness is used to vary responses.
open_questions: Exact text variants and their localization keys/IDs are inferred from disassembly strings but not enumerated here; what are the precise string IDs used?
Precise roles of spawned sub-behaviors U8P_JENNA::0B16 and U8P_JENNA::0BA9 are inferred as short interactions/animations but their concrete effects are not fully reconstructed.
How sendJennaToLunch is managed elsewhere (who/when sets it) and whether setting Jenna 'dead' via Npc::setDead triggers quest or persistence side-effects beyond removal from active area?

main_function.name: U8P_JENNA::look
main_function.purpose: Produce the short descriptive text (bark) shown when a player inspects Jenna, choosing wording based on whether Jenna is dead and on presentation flags controlling name and job/title inclusion.
entry_conditions: Event 0 (U8P_JENNA::look) — triggered when a player/actor inspects or 'looks' at the Jenna NPC.

function_map.name: U8P_JENNA::look
function_map.role: Inspection handler returning a short descriptive bark based on dead/alive and name/job flags.

function_map.name: U8P_JENNA::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Area-entry housekeeping: reset references and spawn continuous behavior (U8P_JENNA::0321).

function_map.name: U8P_JENNA::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Area-exit cleanup: free references, maybe mark dead (send to lunch) or teleport to a random nearby location.

function_map.name: U8P_JENNA::cast
function_map.role: Handle being targeted/attacked: check target, optionally spawn guards or delayed helpers, and issue help barks influenced by randomness.

function_map.name: U8P_JENNA::0321
function_map.role: Spawned continuous patrol/interaction loop: pathfinding to items/points, spawning conversation/interaction subroutines and delays.

function_map.name: U8P_JENNA::04B8
function_map.role: Conversation/proximity-response routine that orients Jenna, chooses randomized lines, and issues barks unless somebodyTalking suppresses them.

function_map.name: U8P_JENNA::0B16
function_map.role: Short spawned sub-behavior invoked by 0321 (likely an animation/movement or micro-interaction).

function_map.name: U8P_JENNA::0BA9
function_map.role: Short spawned sub-behavior invoked by 0321 (likely an animation/movement or micro-interaction).

internal_calls.purpose: Spawn Jenna's continuous patrol/interaction behavior when player enters area.
Spawn conversation/proximity-response when conditions in the patrol loop trigger an interaction.
Spawn short sub-behavior from the patrol loop (timed/conditional micro-action).
Spawn another short sub-behavior from the patrol loop (timed/conditional micro-action).

external_calls.purpose: Test whether Jenna is dead to select corpse vs alive description.
Present the chosen short descriptive text to the inspecting player (pid).
Clear stored references/markers for Jenna on area entry.
Free/clear previously set references when leaving the fast area.
Mark Jenna dead when sendJennaToLunch indicates she should be sent off-duty.
Generate randomness to compute a random teleport destination.
Teleport Jenna to a computed random nearby coordinate when exiting area and not sent to lunch.
Check who is targeting Jenna to decide reactive behavior (guard call, pause, or bark).
Spawn a short delay/helper when no active target or as a paced reaction.
Spawn/notify guards to assist Jenna when targeted by a hostile player.
Issue help/alert barks (e.g., 'Help me, Beren' or 'Town Sorcerer!').
Move Jenna toward scripted points, tokens, or items as part of her patrol loop.
Use as a timed delay between patrol/interaction actions.
Get a small random index to pick among dialogue lines.
Compute facing direction to orient Jenna toward a target before speaking/animating.
Animate or set Jenna's facing/direction as part of orientation logic.
Another orientation/animation method used after computing direction.
Deliver proximity/conversation bark lines to the nearby player/process.
Select between different reactive barks or guard/spawn variants probabilistically.

reads.name: jennaName (global [01EA])
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether Jenna's personal name is used in U8P_JENNA::look() or whether a fallback descriptor is used.

reads.name: jennaJob (global [01EB])
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether job/title (e.g., 'barmaid') is shown in U8P_JENNA::look() or whether a generic 'woman' is used.

reads.name: sendJennaToLunch (global [01EF])
reads.likely_effect: If zero on leaveFastArea triggers marking Jenna dead (send off-duty); otherwise triggers teleport behavior.

reads.name: somebodyTalking (global [000F])
reads.likely_effect: Suppresses conversation barks from U8P_JENNA::04B8 to avoid interrupting ongoing dialogue.

reads.name: orlokMet (global [0137])
reads.likely_effect: Alters which conversation lines are chosen in U8P_JENNA::04B8 depending on player's prior state (met Orlok or not).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides Jenna NPC runtime behavior: presentation when inspected, area-entry/exit housekeeping, a continuous patrol/interaction loop, reactive conversation barks, and simple combat/alert behavior.
